headline: Molina Healthcare Grant For NILP Puts Community Focus In Investor View
summary: Molina Healthcare and The MolinaCares Accord have awarded a major grant to the Northeast Independent Living Program to fund a 12 month pilot for young adults with disabilities in Massachusetts. The initiative, run by NILP, is designed to address support gaps for underserved young adults as they transition to greater independence. The program underscores Molina Healthcare’s focus on community impact and aligns with its broader mission of serving complex and vulnerable populations. Molina...
